subcodes.first_line: The Supreme Pen hath testified, and they that circle round the Most Great, Most Glorious Name bear witness; yet the people remain heedless [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد شهد القلم الاعلی و الذین یطوفون حول الاسم الاعظم الابهی ولکن الناس هم
subcodes.subjects: @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
